Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: The name of the identity we're supposed to update.

Transition.to: Bulk Contractor Expiration Date Extension Form

Step.name: Bulk Contractor Expiration Date Extension Form

Approval.name: Bulk Contractor Expiration Date Extension Form

Step.Description: This approval is for selecting one of the requested roles

Step.name: Confirm Launcher Submission
Step.Description: Displays a FacesMessage upon initial form submission when the launcher of the workflow was not the manager of the target user. Informs them that an approval will be opened.
